{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321142754DDB9C940E2675C92F7E8\"}"},"total":543},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7224125576848016189","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"书写的很精彩，让人放不下，就想一直看下去，感觉还有，可惜完了，谢谢作者的付出。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1681997902,"group_id":"6952447477203078152","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4uJ4dK1NoBRH0IZ5tq+KrE=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776616560\u0026x-signature=%2FYXVdYO%2FVKzIgYSc4FplMZloIxQ%3D","user_id":"241485689660478","user_name":"喜欢撒耳闻的楼夜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"241485689660478","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6952447477203078152","book_info":{"abstract":"《生活与法制》的记者方婕，发现丈夫背着自己，成为一起凶杀案的目击证人。方婕凭着职业的敏锐，追查到丈夫竟与另几个不相干的男人串联起来做伪证，欲置本省的美女富豪于死地。细心的方婕为探求众人做伪证的目的，四处走访调查，收集线索，经过缜密推断，终于拨开层层迷雾找到真相，从而揭开一起沉寂了十六年的凶案……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/d3a9546a130a951fae05bb137c2059f6~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"龙潭散人","author_id":"","book_id":"6952447477203078152","book_name":"迷案疑云","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181010","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"78.8万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":970,\"name\":\"精品小说\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970\u0026name=精品小说\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":165,\"name\":\"悬疑推理\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165\u0026name=悬疑推理\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6952458886271994891","read_count":"18560","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1454733"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"556","tags":"精品小说,悬疑推理","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/d3a9546a130a951fae05bb137c2059f6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779258474\u0026x-signature=QN6gYXWabt7Ly9AANZJ7g5P76tQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.12880337e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321142754DDB9C940E2675C92F7E8\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读87小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":27,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":312879,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":25697},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7374201072929358646","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书的故事情节真是太精彩了！就像我之前经历过的一件事一样，看似毫无关联的人和事，最后却发现有着千丝万缕的联系。书中的方婕通过细心调查揭开了真相，让我很佩服。我觉得这本书很值得一读，尤其是对于喜欢悬疑推理的人来说，绝对不会让你失望！","text_exts":[{"e":102,"s":98,"text":"悬疑推理","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E6%82%AC%E7%96%91%E6%8E%A8%E7%90%86\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740744745C92F7E8%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227374201072929358646%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226952447477203078152%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%82%AC%E7%96%91%E6%8E%A8%E7%90%86%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1715901086,"group_id":"6952447477203078152","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwCDwO3vrVj8EGh1IpJhCqY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"345719464269539","user_name":"阎罗殿的慕云峰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"345719464269539","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6952447477203078152","book_info":{"abstract":"《生活与法制》的记者方婕，发现丈夫背着自己，成为一起凶杀案的目击证人。方婕凭着职业的敏锐，追查到丈夫竟与另几个不相干的男人串联起来做伪证，欲置本省的美女富豪于死地。细心的方婕为探求众人做伪证的目的，四处走访调查，收集线索，经过缜密推断，终于拨开层层迷雾找到真相，从而揭开一起沉寂了十六年的凶案……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/d3a9546a130a951fae05bb137c2059f6~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"龙潭散人","author_id":"","book_id":"6952447477203078152","book_name":"迷案疑云","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181010","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"78.8万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":970,\"name\":\"精品小说\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970\u0026name=精品小说\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":165,\"name\":\"悬疑推理\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165\u0026name=悬疑推理\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6952458886271994891","read_count":"18560","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1454733"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"556","tags":"精品小说,悬疑推理","t
